title: Implement Server-Sent Events (SSE)
description: Evaluate Server-Sent Events (SSE) as a unidirectional, HTTP-native alternative for live updates. Implement 'Last-Event-ID' recovery logic for robust SSE connections.
objectives: Evaluate Server-Sent Events (SSE) as a unidirectional, HTTP-native alternative for live updates.
Implement 'Last-Event-ID' recovery logic for robust SSE connections.
